LanguageData.OrbitalItemStash.description: A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. Most of the valuable resources have been depleted from this asteroid. This location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion.
LanguageData.AsteroidBasic.description: A vacstone asteroid that was towed into orbit around the planet as part of a mining operation long ago. Most of the valuable resources have been depleted from this asteroid. This location can be reached using transport pods, shuttles, or the Hellion.
